support/operator/reporter.py:156-163 defines BRICK_REPORT_GRAIN and the four additive brick-grain event kinds: brick_received, brick_returned, gate_passed, disposition_applied.
support/operator/reporter.py:217-303 validates report_event_policy; grain defaults to building unless env/policy selects brick, and brick grain additively merges the four new event kinds.

support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py:2983-3021 pins no-scheduler constructs over reporter.py, report_sinks.py, run.py, and walker_kernel.py.
